Virgo, the native's father will have difficult times. Between 38 and 40. years
of the native's age, the native's father will die.
The native, during her 58th year, when Jupiter reaches Pisces will
breathe her last on a Tuesday. This is an analysis of a horoscope from Bhrigu
Samhita.

IMPORTANT CHARTS 167
CHART 244
The Sun in this horoscope is
posited in Mercury's house of
Jupt.
exaltation. This indicates that the Mars
Sat.
native's father was very intelligent
right from his infancy. Mars
Dt.
occupying the 7th house from the
Sun indicates that the native's
Db.
father was a man with a bad temper.
Mercury and Venus are in the 2nd
Mer.
house from the Sun and the Moon Moon Sun
Ven.
is located in Sagittarius. This
indicates that the native's father was
good in fine arts and that he earned money through his talents. The native's
father had lived in luxury during his early years. He had misfortune and
troubles only after bis 30th year.
